judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high future expectations but currently unprofitable and trading at a high sales multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 44.8%; next earnings date 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth 51.4% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 441.7% — significant future growth expected.
Forward P/E 34.63 and PEG ratio 0.78 — growth is priced in, but PEG suggests reasonable valuation relative to expected growth.
Current ratio 3.83 and Quick ratio 2.85 — strong short-term liquidity.
Total cash $439.70M vs Total debt $280.42M — manageable debt load with a cash cushion.
negatives: Operating margin -8.6% and Profit margin -8.5% — the company is losing money.
Return on equity -6.1% and Return on assets -3.3% — poor profitability metrics.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-445.58M — significant cash burn.
Price/Sales (TTM) 26.16 — high valuation relative to current sales.
Last quarter missed EPS estimate by 44.8% — execution concerns.

news.paragraph: Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) is mentioned in headlines alongside other AI leaders that saw sell-offs, potentially due to broader market rotation or profit-taking after recent gains. While Mark Cuban is advocating for a focus on foundational AI, the specific news flow for AAOI itself is mixed, with no clear catalyst driving immediate price action. Traders should monitor sector sentiment and any follow-through from the recent AI stock weakness.

headlines.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Iran Delay Saves Dow, But Sandisk, Bloom Energy, AI Leaders Sell Off
